commentary: Strong commercial intent. She wants a quick pilot but needs proof that store managers will actually use the dashboards.
Procurement process is formal and slow. Main risk is legal review, not product fit.
Field team cares about offline reliability and simple handoff from technician to dispatcher.
Compliance team is engaged. Purchase depends on identity controls and data retention commitments.
Likely self-serve expansion. She needs templates and guardrails more than hands-on services.
Strategic platform opportunity across several product lines if technical integration stays lightweight.
